title: Case Study Details

fields.label: Icon
fields.name: icon
fields.instructions: Font Awesome 5 Solid icon, matching the live Case Studies page's own card icons (e.g. fas fa-industry, fas fa-beer-mug-empty, fas fa-recycle). Migrate the exact icon already used for each project on page 978 — see IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE.md's migration table.

fields.label: Summary Snapshot
fields.name: summary_snapshot
fields.instructions: Short card-length outcome line, e.g. "≈£60,000/yr savings, ~48-month payback." Migrate verbatim from the live, already-approved card copy on page 978 — do not rephrase or re-derive figures.

fields.label: Challenge
fields.name: challenge
fields.instructions: 1–2 sentence problem statement. Source: "New Website Proposed Content AH ver2 2026 06 09.docx", §2 (Primary Source, Verified) — migrate as written, do not embellish.

fields.label: Solution
fields.name: solution
fields.instructions: 1–2 sentence description of the engineering solution delivered. Same source as Challenge.

fields.label: Results
fields.name: results
fields.instructions: One result per line — rendered as a bullet list by [iep_case_study_single]. Plain textarea (not a repeater) to match this field group's existing simplicity convention (see team_member_fields.json). Same source as Challenge.

fields.label: Commercial Impact
fields.name: commercial_impact
fields.instructions: The headline financial-outcome line shown on both the card and the single page, e.g. "Potential annual benefit > €700,000". Migrate verbatim from page 978 (the live figure is sometimes more refined than the 2026-06-09 content doc — e.g. Case Study 4's brick-manufacturer figure was an unresolved "Quantify??" in the doc but is £84,000/yr on the live page; the live page is the more current, approved source — use it, not the doc, whenever the two differ).

fields.label: Display Order
fields.name: display_order
fields.instructions: Controls presentation order in [iep_case_study_grid]. Migrate using each project's current position on the live Case Studies page (1–6, see migration table).

description: CMS-006 deployment package — field model for the existing cspt-portfolio CPT (repurposed as Case Studies; no new CPT registered — see DECISIONS.md). Deliberately excludes Client and Address fields, both present in the Envato demo template: the repository's own Primary Source content document explicitly labels these "ANONYMISED CASE STUDIES" (client confidentiality by design, not an unresolved gap), and no real project has a client name or a physical address to migrate — inventing either would fabricate content this engagement's own evidence source deliberately withholds. Sector categorisation is handled via the portfolio-category taxonomy (repurposed, not a new field) — see php/case-study-helper-functions.php.
